mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.role_code = #{roleCode} AND u.status = 1
SELECT u.*, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.status = 1
SELECT u.*, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id ORDER BY u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, role_code, dept_id, phone, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{roleCode}, #{deptId}, #{phone}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND role_code = 'DOCTOR' AND status = 1 ORDER BY user_id
SELECT u.*, d.dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY u.user_id
